metadata.name: Crew Tasks
metadata.source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules 3e pp.76-82 — VERIFIED Mar 22, 2026
metadata.notes: Each campaign turn, crew members not in Sick Bay can perform one task. Up to 2 crew per task (Core Rules p.78).

tasks.name: Find a Patron
tasks.description: Search for someone willing to offer paid work
tasks.roll_mechanic: 1D6 + crew searching + old Patrons + credits spent
tasks.second_threshold_effect: Found 2 Patrons, may choose either job
special_rules: Old Patrons in contacts add +1 each to roll
5+ = found 1 Patron
6+ = found 2 Patrons, choose either job

tasks.name: Train
special_rules: If XP earned allows a Character Upgrade (p.123), resolve immediately

tasks.name: Trade
tasks.description: Buy and sell goods in local markets
tasks.roll_mechanic: Roll D100 on Trade Table per crew member trading
tasks.credit_bonus_note: 3 credits per additional Trade Table roll (at least 1 crew must be Trading)
special_rules: Each crew member Trading gets 1 roll on Trade Table
Can spend 3 credits for each additional roll (requires at least 1 crew Trading)

tasks.name: Recruit
tasks.description: Search for new crew members to hire
tasks.roll_mechanic: Auto if <6 crew, else 1D6 + crew recruiting
tasks.success_reward: New recruit joins (random creation, starts with Handgun)
special_rules: If crew < 6: automatic success, 1 recruit per crew sent
If crew >= 6: roll 1D6 + crew recruiting, 6+ = 1 new recruit
Recruits use random creation but do NOT roll on background tables
Recruits start with basic profile for type + Handgun

tasks.name: Explore
tasks.roll_mechanic: Roll D100 on Exploration Table per crew member exploring
special_rules: Each crew member exploring rolls once on Exploration Table

tasks.name: Track
tasks.description: Track down a Rival for a showdown
tasks.success_reward: Located Rival of choice — fight this turn
special_rules: Requires having Rivals
6+ locates a Rival of your choice
May spend credits for +1 each before rolling

tasks.name: Repair Your Kit
tasks.credit_bonus_note: Each credit spent on spare parts = +1 (no cap stated)
special_rules: Roll 1D6 + Savvy of repairing character
+1 if character is an Engineer
May spend credits on spare parts: +1 per credit
6+ = item repaired
Natural 1 ALWAYS fails regardless of modifiers — item destroyed

tasks.name: Decoy
tasks.success_reward: +1 to Rival avoidance roll per crew assigned
special_rules: Passive effect: +1 to the roll when checking if Rivals track you down, per crew sent as Decoy
